summary: Iteration 3 testing complete: Backend 100% pass (38/38 regression tests). Frontend: 7/10 features working. CRITICAL: 3 major UI features NOT implemented despite being in requirements: (1) EDITOR'S PICK hero card, (2) Spot Detail sticky action bar with Add to Collection sheet, (3) Profile gradient banner. All implemented features working correctly: skeletons, 4:5 aspect ratio, badges, paywall comparison matrix, YOUR PLAN badge, FAB styling, admin reports.

missing_features.feature: EDITOR'S PICK hero card on Home
missing_features.evidence: Code defines `const hero = (feed.trending || [])[0]` at line 94 of index.tsx but never renders it. No hero card JSX in the component.

missing_features.feature: Spot Detail sticky bottom action bar (Saved, Add, Check-in buttons)
missing_features.evidence: AddToCollectionSheet component imported but never used. Styles for actionBar, actBtn, actBtnPrimary defined (lines 390-403) but no JSX renders the action bar. Component ends at line 280 without action bar.
No LinearGradient component in profile JSX. Style `bannerWrap` defined at line 197 but never used. Profile goes directly from topBar to headerCard without banner.

action_items: CRITICAL: Implement EDITOR'S PICK hero card on Home screen (show first trending spot as large hero card at top)
CRITICAL: Implement sticky bottom action bar on Spot Detail with 3 buttons: Saved (bookmark toggle), Add (opens AddToCollectionSheet), Check-in (navigates to /review/{id})
CRITICAL: Implement gradient banner on Profile screen behind avatar (LinearGradient with colors: orange→red→transparent)
Optional: Add DetailSkeleton to Spot Detail loading state (component exists but may not be used during loading)
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: All 38 regression tests passed (18 iteration 1 + 20 iteration 2)
✓ Backend: All endpoints working correctly (auth, spots, feed, collections, reviews, follows, admin, privacy, feature gating, packs)
✓ Frontend: Home loading shows shimmer skeletons (SectionSkeleton component)
✓ Frontend: SpotCard uses 4:5 portrait aspect ratio (aspectRatio: 4/5 at line 129 of SpotCard.tsx)
✓ Frontend: APPROX badge renders correctly (blue badge with MapPin icon)
✓ Frontend: PRIVATE badge renders correctly (black badge with Lock icon)
✓ Frontend: PREMIUM badge renders correctly (orange badge)
✓ Frontend: Paywall screen shows 'Compare plans' section at bottom with feature comparison matrix
✓ Frontend: Paywall shows 'YOUR PLAN' badge on current plan card (green badge, tested with sophie@photoscout.app on pro plan)
✓ Frontend: FAB (Add tab button) is 48x48px with amber glow shadow (shadowColor: colors.primary, shadowOpacity: 0.4, shadowRadius: 10)
✓ Frontend: Admin user sees pink/orange 'Reports' button in /admin screen that navigates to /admin/reports
✗ Frontend: EDITOR'S PICK hero card NOT implemented (hero variable defined but never rendered)
✗ Frontend: Spot Detail sticky action bar NOT implemented (styles exist, AddToCollectionSheet imported, but JSX missing)
✗ Frontend: Profile gradient banner NOT implemented (no LinearGradient in code)
⚠ Frontend: Skeleton.tsx and AddToCollectionSheet.tsx are new components but AddToCollectionSheet is never used
seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 is a polish iteration with NO new backend endpoints. Backend is 100% stable. Frontend has 3 CRITICAL missing features that need implementation: (1) EDITOR'S PICK hero card on Home, (2) Sticky action bar on Spot Detail with AddToCollectionSheet integration, (3) Gradient banner on Profile. All other polish features are working correctly. The components exist (Skeleton.tsx, AddToCollectionSheet.tsx) but are not fully integrated. Main agent needs to add the missing JSX to render these features.

frontend_home_hero_card.actual: Hero variable defined but not rendered

frontend_spot_detail_action_bar.actual: Action bar not rendered, AddToCollectionSheet not used

frontend_spot_detail_skeleton.actual: DetailSkeleton component exists and is used (line 89 of spot/[id].tsx)

frontend_paywall_your_plan.actual: Green YOUR PLAN badge displays on pro card for sophie@photoscout.app
